title: Fault-Finding Diagnostic Arena
summary: This troubleshooting trainer injects realistic faults into a branch circuit and asks the learner to test safely, isolate the issue, identify the root cause, and verify the repair.
learningObjectives: Follow a structured symptom-to-repair troubleshooting sequence.
Distinguish between open circuits, short circuits, ground faults, overloads, and loose connections.
Use safe meter-based evidence instead of guessing.

environment.setting: Training board with panel, switches, receptacles, loads, and fault injection controller
environment.focus: Evidence-based troubleshooting with safe testing habits

interactables.label: Scenario selector
interactables.teaches: Loads hidden faults and symptom descriptions.

interactables.label: Test nodes
interactables.teaches: Encourages voltage comparison across logical points in the circuit.

interactables.label: Virtual multimeter
interactables.teaches: Supports voltage, continuity, and resistance tests with safe restrictions.

interactables.label: Repair confirmation panel
interactables.teaches: Requires the learner to apply the correct fix before re-energizing.

tasks: Verify the reported symptom before opening the circuit.
Probe the correct test points to narrow the likely fault.
Submit the correct diagnosis from the available fault types.
Complete the repair and confirm normal operation after re-energizing.
completion: Learner uses a logical and safe testing sequence.
Learner diagnoses the injected fault correctly.
Learner verifies the repair instead of stopping at partial success.
